candidate_definition_hints.text: High-accuracy NLP parser with models for 11 languages.

A high-accuracy parser with models for 11 languages, implemented in Python. Based on [Constituency Parsing with a Self-Attentive Encoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/1805.01052) from ACL 2018, with additional changes described in [Multilingual Constituency Parsing with Self-Attention …
